query:
SELECT c.externalId AS customerExternalId, c.name AS customerName, c.billingPlatforms, c.serviceCount,
       s.externalId AS serviceExternalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.supplierName, s.supplierAccount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId IN ('cust-action-smart-group', 'cust-envest')
ORDER BY c.name;
